paper.title_en: How to Count States in Gravity
paper.abstract_en: Gibbons and Hawking proposed that the Euclidean gravity path integral with periodic boundary conditions in time computes the thermal partition sum of gravity. As a corollary, they argued that a derivative of the associated free energy with respect to the Euclidean time period computes gravitational entropy. Why is this interpretation correct? That is, why does this path integral compute a trace over the Hilbert space? Here, we show that the quantity computed by the Gibbons-Hawking path integral is equal to an {\it a priori} different object -- an explicit thermal trace over the Hilbert space spanned by states produced by the Euclidean gravity path integral. This follows in two ways: (a) if the Hilbert space with two boundaries factorizes into a product of two single boundary Hilbert spaces, as we have previously shown; and (b) via explicit resolution of the trace by a spanning basis of states. We similarly show how a replicated Euclidean gravity path integral with a single periodic boundary computes a Hilbert space trace of powers of the density matrix, explaining why this approach computes the entropy of states entangled between two universes.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文深入探讨了Gibbons-Hawking路径积分计算引力熵的物理解释，属于黑洞热力学方向，理论深度高，推理清晰。
decision.title_zh: 如何对引力中的状态进行计数
decision.abstract_zh: Gibbons和Hawking提出，具有时间周期性边界条件的欧几里得引力路径积分计算引力的热配分函数。作为推论，他们认为相应的自由能对欧几里得时间周期的导数计算引力熵。为什么这个解释是正确的？也就是说，为什么这个路径积分计算希尔伯特空间上的迹？在这里，我们表明，由Gibbons-Hawking路径积分计算的数量等于一个先验不同的对象——由欧几里得引力路径积分产生的状态所张成的希尔伯特空间上的显式热迹。这通过两种方式得出：(a) 如果具有两个边界的希尔伯特空间因子化为两个单边界希尔伯特空间的乘积，正如我们之前所示；(b) 通过由一组跨越基对迹的显式分解。我们类似地展示了具有单个周期边界的复制欧几里得引力路径积分如何计算密度矩阵幂的希尔伯特空间迹，解释了为什么这种方法计算两个宇宙之间纠缠状态的熵。
